creator: yklaxds@gmail.com
text:
We are an open source community about FreeBSD that has been going on in China for 4 years. Recently we have been working on videos based on our beginner's tutorial FreeBSD-Ask and our translated handbook in simplified Chinese ( https://github.com/FreeBSD-Ask/FreeBSD-Ask and https://github.com/FreeBSD-Ask/Handbook ) to make it easier for people to learn FreeBSD. We've been making videos to help people learn about FreeBSD, and we've been looking at legal and trademark issues.

We accidentally discovered through our data search that a Chinese company, Beijing Yuan Yun CNC Technology Co( Chinese is "北京远韵数控技术有限公司"). Linux, on the other hand, has not been registered by anyone in classes 9 and 42, and all applications have been rejected by the trademark authority. This company registered these trademarks on 2017-7-27 and 2016-08-23 respectively. This company appears to be a shell company and is not using the FreeBSD trademark.

This company's actions may pose a legal risk to our efforts to promote and advertise FreeBSD. We therefore need some help from the FreeBSD community and the FreeBSD Foundation.
